tagline: Searching for measures and dimensions in the metric view overview page now returns correct results across paginated results and supports filtering by display name.
what_it_does: Searching for measures and dimensions in the metric view overview page now returns correct results across paginated results and supports filtering by display name. Metric views are the core implementation of Unity Catalog business semantics in Unity Catalog. They provide a centralized way to define and manage business metrics by separating measure definitions from the fields (also called dimensions) used to group, filter, and aggregate them, so you can define metrics once and query them at runtime.
why_it_matters: + Agent metadata in metric views + Add synonyms, display names, and formatting rules to improve AI agent accuracy and display consistent formats across tools.
plain_summary: Searching for measures and dimensions in the metric view overview page now returns correct results across paginated results and supports filtering by display name. Metric views are the core implementation of Unity Catalog business semantics in Unity Catalog.

capabilities.title: Define metric views using SQL
capabilities.desc: Define metric views using SQL DDL or the Catalog Explorer UI, with built-in YAML validation.

capabilities.title: Query metric views from SQL
capabilities.desc: Query metric views from SQL editors, notebooks, dashboards, Genie Agents, and alerts.

key_takeaway: Searching for measures and dimensions in the metric view overview page now returns correct results across paginated results and supports filtering by display name.
